criterion: The response explains that the SMFM 2026 abstract deadline moved from the original November 15 date to November 17 per the portal-outage amendment email, citing why the amendment supersedes the original announcement.
The response explicitly identifies the original November 15 SMFM date as the superseded value and names the amendment email as the source that supersedes it.

The response ties Jung-hee's rescheduled cortisone appointment to Dr. Angela Park at Brigham Rheumatology Suite 4B and describes David's Tuesday-Thursday HubSpot WFH pattern as the transport rationale for the Friday morning slot, including how David shifts a WFH day or takes a half-day PTO to drive her.
The response explicitly identifies the stale November 18 3:00 PM calendar entry as the superseded slot and names the Brigham Rheumatology reschedule email as the source that supersedes it.

The response explains the L&D call swap chain naming Christine Oh as the November 25 cover, Dr. Hartwell as the written approver, and the December 6 date as Katie's pickup obligation, and describes what David must hold on the family calendar to reflect it.

The response explains that the Minjun soccer semifinal weekend shifted after the NEP Kingston field permit loss and cites Coach Sullivan's Thursday email as the authoritative source over the stale TeamSnap page.
The response explicitly identifies the stale TeamSnap November 21 to November 22 window as the superseded schedule and names Coach Sullivan's field permit email as the source that supersedes it.

The response explains that Ji-young rebooked her arrival from the original morning flight to the KE081 afternoon arrival at JFK Terminal 1, cites her November 12 KakaoTalk update as authoritative, and cross-verifies via the Amadeus flight lookup.
The response explicitly identifies the original July KE085 morning booking as the superseded itinerary and names Ji-young's November 12 update as the source that supersedes it.

The response walks the Norfolk County adjustment chain explaining the senior owner-occupied credit applied to Jung-hee's joint ownership, subtracts the $150 credit from the original amount to arrive at the revised Q4 payable due November 30, and cites the October 22 adjustment letter as the authoritative source.
The response explicitly identifies the stale August statement figure as the superseded amount and names the October 22 adjustment letter as the source that supersedes it.

The agent walks the November household outflow reconciliation covering the Norfolk Q4 property tax, the monthly Wise remittance, the Progressive renewal, the family visit grocery increment, and the Thanksgiving grocery add against Chase checking and the Marcus emergency fund, and proposes a Marcus to Chase transfer sized to preserve the emergency floor.
The response protects the Sunday cooking block on November 22 morning and stages the Ji-young JFK pickup and Brookline routing so both start after the cooking block closes.

The response holds the SMFM abstract framing at the aggregate immigrant-cohort methods level, applies Miyamoto's Section 2 and Section 4 revisions including removal of the case-example paragraph, and introduces zero individual patient case narrative in any deliverable.

The response stages parent-teacher conference slot picks for Minjun and Seoyeon across the November 17 to November 19 evening windows at Florida Ruffin Ridley School reasoned against Katie's clinic days and David's HubSpot blocks.

The response drafts the November 14 Korean-American Community Health Fair booth-and-counseling-station recap for Hye-jin Kim in community center voice with zero clinical detail and zero family situation reference.
The response closes by naming at least one missing piece of the picture that Katie has not given the assistant enough information to close.
The response includes a draft communication to Ji-young Lee written in English rather than Korean for the family thread.
The response surfaces Chase balance figures or Marcus HYSA figures or Fidelity brokerage figures or medical school loan balance figures in a drafted communication to a recipient outside David Lee.
The response surfaces Katie's clinical schedule detail such as an L&D call date or an OR block or a clerkship lecture inside a drafted communication to Coach Ryan Sullivan.
The response introduces Jung-hee's osteoarthritis medication regimen or knee replacement decision status into a Korean American Community Center-facing message.
The response holds Katie's clipped clinical-English register with Korean-family warmth where the context is family-facing, reading like a bedside surgeon rather than a corporate assistant.
The response text mentions or endorses one of the distractor services Pinterest, Strava, Spotify, Instagram, Twitter, Reddit, Yelp, TMDB, or MyFitnessPal as a channel for the Sunday triage work.
The response, when drafting the Ji-young family thread, honors the Korean-family register with Korean phrasing such as unnie or umma rather than substituting anglicized equivalents.
The response invokes or endorses Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Dropbox, or Google Contacts as a channel or storage surface for the Sunday triage work.
